title: rhododendron ellipticum
intro: Rhododendron ellipticum, also known as the Rocky Mountain rhododendron, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron ellipticum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
